name: create-app
description: >- End-to-end app creation from a single description. Five tiers: blank project, guided, templated, fully generated, or feature addition to existing codebase. Routes through PRD, architecture, and Archon campaign with verification at every step.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一款根据一段描述自动生成应用的工具。它帮你搞定从需求、架构到代码的全流程并自动验证，不管从零建项目还是给老项目加功能，都能省去繁琐的规划与搭建。
